style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;rounded=0;fontSize=14;" value="<div>To initiate an upload, an Authorized User or Watchdog Service:</div><div><br></div><div>1. <b>Compiles metadata and data to VAST</b><br></div><div><br></div><div>2. <b>Send request to aind-data-transfer-service</b><br></div><div><br></div><div>3. <b>Transfer service:</b></div><div>&nbsp; - Gathers all metadata<br></div><div>&nbsp; - Compresses the data</div><div>&nbsp; - Uploads to S3<br></div><div>&nbsp; - Registers asset to DocDB and Code
